description_long: This is a tall, rectangular wooden display cabinet with two large glass-paneled doors on the front, each featuring a grid of smaller glass sections. The cabinet stands on four slender legs, elevating it slightly above the ground, and has a light natural wood finish. The doors are fitted with small round handles at the center for easy opening. The interior is divided into several horizontal shelves, ideal for displaying or storing items while keeping them visible through the glass. The sides and back of the cabinet are solid wood, providing structural support and a clean appearance. This type of cabinet is commonly used for showcasing collectibles, books, or decorative items in urban living rooms, offices, or public spaces.
description: A tall, light wood display cabinet with glass-paneled double doors and multiple interior shelves, elevated on slender legs. The front features small round handles and a grid of glass sections for visibility.
description_view_0: Front view showing the double glass-paneled doors, grid pattern, and central handles.
description_view_1: Side view revealing the cabinet's narrow depth and solid wood side panel.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the solid wood back panel with no openings or features.
description_view_3: Opposite side view, similar to view 1, showing the cabinet's slim profile.
